reasoning: On May 9, 2025, just two weeks prior to the knowledge cutoff, Rippling announced a $450 million Series G funding round at a $16.8 billion valuation. Alongside this funding, the company planned a $200 million tender offer to provide liquidity to employees, an event the CEO hopes to make annual. Most crucially, CEO Parker Conrad explicitly stated that Rippling had "no immediate plans to go public," noting that their focus remains on high growth rather than the profitability typically required for modern public market debuts. Given this very recent and explicit statement against near-term IPO plans, a fresh influx of private capital, and a direct alternative for employee liquidity, there is a negligible chance of an IPO announcement (via S-1 or blog post) before the July 1, 2025 resolution date, which is merely 5-6 weeks away.
